R0227.title: Build Artifact Poisoning Risk
R0227.definition: Attackers tamper with build artifacts, container images, or release packages to introduce backdoors into production.
R0227.description: Attackers tamper with build artifacts, container images, or release packages to introduce backdoors into production.
R0227.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
